meta_title: For Freelancers: API integration guide to Solve no version control (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to API integration guide and overcome no version control. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer API Integration Guide: Fix Version Control Issues
content.seo_description: Master API integration and solve version control chaos as a freelancer. Use Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop manually tracking code changes. By integrating your API workflow with Git-backed version control, you create a source of truth for every client project. Use Antigravity to automate boilerplate setup and Claude Code to enforce commit standards, ensuring your builds are professional, repeatable, and audit-ready from day one.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a folder named 'project_final_v2_REAL'. The client is asking for a feature update, but you’re paralyzed by the fear that one wrong line of code will break the entire production environment. As a freelancer, your reputation is built on speed, but without version control, you are one typo away from a career-limiting disaster.

This isn't just about saving files; it's about building a scalable engine for your business. By mastering API integration with professional tooling, you transform from a frantic 'coder' into a high-leverage 'AI Builder'. We are replacing chaos with a systematic workflow that allows you to ship complex integrations in hours, not weeks.

steps.title: Initialize Git-Backed Repository
steps.description: Before touching an API, ensure your local environment is tied to a remote repository. This prevents code loss and enables rollback.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional Node.js project structure with a .gitignore file tailored for API keys and environment variables.

steps.title: Configure Environment Variables
steps.description: Never hardcode API keys. Use an .env file to manage secrets securely, keeping them out of your version control history.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a boilerplate API client class that reads from process.env and includes error handling for failed authentication.

steps.title: Automate API Client Boilerplate
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate clean, typed API request wrappers so you don't waste time on repetitive fetch calls.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular Axios wrapper for REST API calls with built-in retry logic and logging.

steps.title: Establish Commit Conventions
steps.description: Use Claude Code to enforce semantic commit messages. This gives your client a clear history of exactly what features were added and when.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a pre-commit hook that validates code style and ensures commit messages follow Conventional Commits.

steps.title: Deploy and Version Release
steps.description: Tag your releases in Git. This allows you to deploy specific versions to your client's staging environment with zero friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment script that bundles the code and tags the current commit as 'v1.0.0'.
steps.claude_code_command: git tag v1.0.0 && git push origin v1.0.0

pro_tips: Always use a .env.example file in your repo so clients know exactly which keys they need to provide.
Use 'git bisect' when a client reports a bug; it will save you hours of manual debugging by pinpointing the exact commit that introduced the issue.
Automate your API documentation using OpenAPI/Swagger comments; it makes your code look like it was built by a Fortune 500 engineering team.
Never commit directly to main; use feature branches for every new API endpoint to keep your production code pristine.
Keep your Claude Code context window lean by using a .claudeignore file to exclude large build artifacts from the AI's analysis.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/doc
content.next_steps: Now that your environment is locked down, audit your existing client projects. Move them into a version-controlled workflow one by one to ensure you never lose work again.
content.conversion_block: Stop manually managing your code and start scaling your freelance business with professional infrastructure. You have the tools, the workflow, and the expertise. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
